name: Curse of Darkness
short_description: is a tense survival game in a post-apocalyptic world where the player has to collect parts of a crashed car to save himself while avoiding deadly monsters. Four different creatures roam the world, each with their own special abilities
detailed_description:
Curse of Darkness is a tense survival game in a post-apocalyptic world where the player has to collect parts of a crashed car to save himself while avoiding deadly monsters. Four different creatures roam the world, each with their own special abilities that keep you constantly on edge.

The player needs not only to search for machine parts, but also to collect resources

Watch your health, stamina and noise level so as not to attract the attention of monsters

The game offers a variety of ways to achieve the goal and decisions that will affect the ending.

Action-horror adventure with elements of survival

supported_languages:
English*, Traditional Chinese*, Russian*, Ukrainian*, French*, Spanish - Spain*, Polish*, Indonesian*
*languages with full audio support
